flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Goddard College are 57% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($25.6k vs $59.9k).

flags.label: Debt-to-earnings
flags.summary: Debt-to-earnings ratio of 8.7% at Goddard College exceeds the 8% gainful-employment threshold ($16.8k debt amortized over 10 years vs $25.6k earnings).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Goddard College are 38% below 6-year earnings ($41.1k → $25.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Goddard College rose 20% between 2006 and 2009 ($10.4k → $12.5k).
